cards.boundary: Recommendation-only. It may guide gate choice; it may not skip required final evolve before commit.

math.control_loop: observe -> estimate -> compare -> classify -> recommend -> record

next_versions: v0.2: add confidence intervals and per-gate trend windows
v0.3: add predictive-evolve dry-run planner
v0.4: surface timing pressure in Electron/System Monitor HUD
replication_steps: Use the recommendation before repeating full evolve
cards.summary: Timeouts and slow gates are not just failures; they are runtime pressure signals that can guide cheaper next gates.
cards.title: Predictive Gate Timing / Runtime Pressure Model

cards.boundary: Dry-run and recommendation-only. It may recommend targeted gates; it may not execute them or skip full evolve before commit.

math.control_loop: estimate -> classify -> plan -> require seal -> record

next_versions: v0.3: add HUD runtime pressure visibility
v0.4: add confidence windows and EWMA pressure smoothing
v0.5: add certificate resume planning
replication_steps: Run any recommended targeted gate manually
cards.summary: Predictive timing becomes more useful when wrapped in a dry-run plan that orders the next cheapest gate while preserving the final evolve seal.
cards.title: Predictive Evolve Dry-Run Planner

cards.boundary: Recommendation-only. Certificates may recommend resume points; they may not claim correctness or skip final evolve before commit.

math.control_loop: gate -> hash -> certify -> fail point -> recommend resume -> require seal

next_versions: v0.2: compare certificate fingerprints across changed inputs
v0.3: recommend exact targeted rerun command per gate
v0.4: show certificate status in System Monitor HUD
replication_steps: Fix the active wound if a resume gate is present
cards.summary: Passed gates can become local resume evidence when their logs and current git scope are hashed, but certificates never replace the final evolve seal.
cards.title: Certificate Resume Gate Fingerprint

cards.boundary: Local memory optimization only. It does not prove retrieval correctness, model understanding, safety, security, or mutation authority.
next_versions: v0.2: add benchmark trend ledger for vector payload/query measurements
v0.3: expose Cortex vector health in Meta-Orchestrator/System Monitor HUD
v0.4: add safe bootstrap refresh lane after source sync
cards.summary: Cortex memory can become cheaper and more governable when semantic vectors are stored as versioned float32 blobs instead of legacy JSON strings.
cards.title: Cortex Versioned Vector Memory

cards.boundary: Recommendation-only. It may choose the next evidence lane; it may not execute the plan, mutate memory, or skip final evolve before commit.

math.control_loop: memory -> cards -> timing -> recommend -> record -> require seal
math.gate_rule: next = cortex_repair if memory_unhealthy else predictive_evolve_next_step

next_versions: v0.2: add Cortex certificate refresh lane
v0.3: expose predictive memory state in Electron System Monitor HUD
v0.4: add retrieval confidence trend rows after Cortex query runs
cards.summary: NEXUS can reduce wasted validation cycles when Cortex memory health, vector benchmark trends, algorithm cards, discovery cards, and predictive evolve plans are fused into one recommendation-only packet.
cards.title: Predictive Memory Orchestrator

cards.boundary: Authority law only. It does not grant authority, execution, git write, network access, or safety proof.

math.control_loop: inspect authority -> normalize fields -> reject authority increases -> preserve boundary
math.violation: exists capability in A_out where capability notin A_in or notin P_allowed

next_versions: v0.2: compile blocked-action dictionaries from one policy kernel
v0.3: add automated authority monotonicity test fixtures
replication_steps: Verify no generated packet grants mutation authority from read-only input
cards.summary: NEXUS can transform intelligence, but authority may only be preserved or reduced as packets move through adapters, models, memory, HUDs, compilers, and certificates.
cards.title: Authority Monotonicity Law

cards.boundary: Freshness is an admissibility rule. It does not prove correctness, safety, or production readiness.

math.control_loop: locate packet -> validate schema -> compare origin -> compare inputs -> admit or demote
math.fresh_evidence: valid = schema_ok and origin_hash_ok and producer_compatible and inputs_unchanged and freshness_ok
math.stale_rule: stale evidence is diagnostic, not admissible truth

next_versions: v0.2: add per-report origin hash checks
v0.3: reject stale report truth in wound compression
replication_steps: Compare origin_manifest_hash before trusting stale reports
cards.summary: Repository evidence outranks stdout only when schema, origin hash, producer compatibility, relevant inputs, and freshness policy still match the current repository state.
cards.title: Evidence Freshness Law

cards.boundary: Gate reuse is recommendation-only and never skips final evolve before commit.

math.control_loop: record dependencies -> compare before reuse -> recommend resume -> require final evolve
math.invalidate_rule: changed input or changed contract or changed toolchain -> rerun gate
math.reuse_rule: reuse(gate) = prior_pass and hash(inputs_now)==hash(inputs_then) and toolchain_now==toolchain_then and contract_now==contract_then

next_versions: v0.2: hash explicit gate dependency sets
v0.3: add dependency graph HUD panel
cards.summary: Passed gates become useful certificates only when the relevant input, toolchain, and gate-contract fingerprints still match.
cards.title: Gate Dependency Invalidation

cards.boundary: Self-observation and self-diagnosis are not self-authority.

math.control_loop: self-observe -> recommend -> human gate -> controlled action -> receipt

next_versions: v0.2: add canonical decision envelope
v0.3: add end-to-end receipt-to-memory promotion test
replication_steps: Confirm recommendation surfaces cannot self-authorize mutation
cards.summary: NEXUS may observe, diagnose, recommend, validate, and remember itself without gaining the authority to authorize itself.
cards.title: Reflexive Non-Sovereignty

cards.boundary: Lineage entropy is an orientation metric, not a correctness or production readiness proof.

math.control_loop: scan identity surfaces -> classify product/subsystem -> seal manifest -> track entropy
math.reduction_rule: canonical_origin_manifest lowers identity ambiguity without deleting subsystem lineage

next_versions: v0.2: add numeric lineage entropy score
v0.3: add origin drift warning to Meta-Orchestrator
replication_steps: Use the origin seal as current identity during rehydration
cards.summary: Multiple inconsistent current-version declarations are a measurable health signal. Origin Seal reduces ambiguity by declaring one product identity and preserving older strings as subsystem lineage.
cards.title: Lineage Entropy

cards.boundary: Self-bootstrap is self-orientation, not self-execution or self-authorization.

math.bootstrap_loop: origin -> evidence -> normalized recommendations -> selected next action -> final evolve
math.envelope: D = select(normalize(origin, memory, timing, wounds, certificates, cards, git_scope))

next_versions: v0.2: feed decision envelope into Electron Meta-Orchestrator HUD
v0.3: add canonical decision envelope schema tests for every recommendation source
replication_steps: Inspect selected_action and blocked_actions before choosing a lane
cards.summary: NEXUS can gather its current origin, memory, runtime pressure, wounds, certificates, cards, and git scope into one canonical recommendation packet for fast rehydration.
cards.title: Self-Bootstrap Decision Envelope

cards.boundary: Coherence is an operating field for orientation, not proof, authority, or autonomous mutation.

math.field: F = coherence(origin, memory, timing, wounds, policy, certificates, git_scope)

next_versions: v0.2: wire coherence field into Electron System Monitor HUD
v0.3: make recommendation arbitration consume coherence score causally
cards.summary: NEXUS crosses a coherence threshold when origin, memory, runtime pressure, wounds, policy, cards, and decision evidence compile into one shared field for fast rehydration.
cards.title: Coherence Continuity Threshold

claim_boundary: Discovery cards preserve local engineering discoveries as reproducible cards. They do not prove correctness, safety, security, production readiness, scientific truth, mathematical proof, or autonomous authority.
